review_text: Bought this for my home office setup. The chair has been holding up well for 6 months of 8-hour daily use. Lumbar support is firm — took a week to get used to but my back pain has noticeably improved. The armrests started squeaking after 3 months but a bit of WD-40 fixed it. Assembly took about 45 minutes. Wheels glide smoothly on hardwood but leave faint marks on lighter floors so I added a chair mat. For the price point it beats anything from Office Depot.

Disappointed with this air fryer. The basket coating started flaking off after about 4 months of regular use, mostly when I make chicken wings at 400F. The display also stopped responding to the timer button last week. I followed all the cleaning instructions and never used metal utensils. Reached out to support and they offered a 20% refund only. The food it cooks is decent when it works but durability is a real issue. Would not recommend.

I switched from a Garmin Forerunner 245 to this watch for half-marathon training. GPS lock is faster, usually within 10 seconds outdoors. Battery life is about 6 days with daily 1-hour workouts and sleep tracking. Heart rate is accurate compared to my Polar chest strap during steady-state runs but lags 5-10 seconds in interval workouts. The screen is bright enough in direct sunlight. Strap was uncomfortable initially, swapped to a third-party silicone one and it's perfect now.
Best product! Excellent quality! 5 stars! Highly recommend! Amazing!
Awesome product. Super quality. Great delivery. Best price. Top brand. Must buy. Recommended.
